name: team-quest-log-01
title: Team Quest Log
author: ilinxa
description: A light team narrative overlay (system E5): an editable, skippable quest name (a blank name falls back to the team's literal name — never forced) plus a milestone-chapter timeline with deterministic done / current / upcoming beats (current = the first not-done beat; an unresolved milestoneId renders gracefully + dev-warns, never crashes). Deliberately lighter than gantt/calendar — chapters, not a time axis. Emits narrative.chapter-viewed once per chapter per mount when a beat first scrolls into view (one IntersectionObserver, fire-once, SSR-guarded, click fallback). Ships shadcn-style: a batteries-included <TeamQuestLog01> plus a headless <TeamQuestLogRoot> (title resolution + draft/edit state + beat derivation + telemetry + a forwardRef handle: focusNameEditor / scrollToChapter) + flat parts (TeamQuestNameEditor, TeamQuestChapters) + context-free primitives (QuestTitle, QuestNameField, ChapterRail, ChapterBeat, EmptyNarrative), so a timeline-only or name-only subset falls out. Team-scoped, controlled. Portable — zero next/*, SSR-safe, imports no other registry component. Sixth and final component of the gamification-system.
